title: Instance Sync
definition: The alignment or resonance of two instances (versions) of consciousness within a simulated universe.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Two minds in different parts of the simulation recognizing and understanding each other, despite being separate entities.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A phenomenon where two instances of consciousness within a simulated reality establish mutual understanding or resonance through shared experiences or recognition of common truths.
difficulty_levels.expert: The alignment of two instances of consciousness within a simulated universe as evidence of a deeper, interconnected reality beneath the surface of individual instances.

extra_fields.insight: Instance sync highlights the potential for unity and shared understanding among different instances of a simulated universe.
